data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an 'Equipment on-site log' as part of the reporting requirements. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or data regarding the logging of equipment on-site, which is a critical component of the requirement. The absence of this specific functionality indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement as outlined in the use case.
gaps: No evidence of an 'Equipment on-site log' being implemented or recorded.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
